title: Pure Indulgent Peruvian Prawns Ceviche
description: A sweet and light Peruvian dish featuring raw frozen prawns, this sugar-free-friendly ceviche is a treat for the taste buds, the prawns are first thawed then marinated in a zesty mix of lime juice and spices.
instructions: Thaw the frozen prawns according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, mixed greens, red onion, ají amarillo pepper, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the thawed prawns to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 30 minutes to allow the prawns to marinate.
Just before serving, lay a lettuce leaf flat on a work surface and place a portion of the prawn mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end of the leaf over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining lettuce leaves and prawn mixture.
Serve the ceviche immediately, garnished with additional lime wedges if desired.
